content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Sun, 15 Feb 2026 08:47:36 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 241 | Critical: 79 | High: 27 | Medium: 20 | Low: 115

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [AFRICA] Act On Attacks Against Nigerians In South Africa , Center Tells Govt (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran open to compromises to reach nuclear deal with US : Report (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Operation Hawkeye strike : US intensifies air war on ISIS in Syria (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] European Debate Over Nuclear Weapons Gains Pace (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] China shuns any nuclear commitments ... for itself (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (51 events, 27 critical, 6 high):
    - Iran open to compromises to reach nuclear deal with US : Report
    - Operation Hawkeye strike : US intensifies air war on ISIS in Syria
    - US , Iran to hold new round of nuclear talks in Geneva this week , Swiss government says
  Ukraine/Russia (19 events, 5 critical, 2 high):
    - European Debate Over Nuclear Weapons Gains Pace
    - China shuns any nuclear commitments ... for itself
    - The war dead pictured on banned Ukrainian athlete's helmet
  Europe (35 events, 13 critical, 2 high):
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
    - Motorway collapses as deadly storms hit France, Portugal and Spain
  Indo-Pacific (39 events, 3 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (7 events, 2 critical, 2 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (60 events, 13 critical, 6 high):
    - New Zealand officials warn more flooding could hit north island as man killed after heavy rain
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source
    - University expels student who called for accountability over Hong Kong fire

Sources: GDELT, The Guardian, BBC World, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC Africa, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, NYT World, BBC Asia, The Diplomat
